name: Alice In Chains
bio: Alice In Chains built a heavy, emotionally durable catalog that continues to earn through rock streaming, nostalgia demand, and long-term playlist rotation.
notable_for: Dark harmonies, grunge-era influence, and one of the most replayed heavy-rock catalogs of the 1990s.
career_highlight: Songs from their early albums still anchor major rock playlists and catalog listening decades later.
revenue_drivers: Rock catalog streaming remains steady across multiple generations of listeners.
Grunge-era nostalgia keeps core tracks in editorial and user playlists.
The band's recognizable sound supports sync and documentary-style licensing.
